textAr: قٓ ۚ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ٱلْمَجِيدِ
textEn: Qāf. By the Glorious Qur’an!
textTranslit: Qaaaf; wal Qur aanil Majeed

textAr: بَلْ عَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَقَالَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا شَىْءٌ عَجِيبٌ
textEn: But they wonder that a warner has come to them from among themselves, so the disbelievers say, “This is something strange!
textTranslit: Bal 'ajibooo an jaa'ahum munzirum minhum faqaalal kaafiroona haazaa shai'un 'ajeeb

textAr: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا ۖ ذَٰلِكَ رَجْعٌۢ بَعِيدٌ
textEn: What! Is it when we die and become dust [will we return to life]? That is a far-fetched return.”
textTranslit: 'A-izaa mitnaa wa kunnaa turaaban zaalika raj'um ba'eed

textAr: قَدْ عَلِمْنَا مَا تَنقُصُ ٱلْأَرْضُ مِنْهُمْ ۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَـٰبٌ حَفِيظٌۢ
textEn: We certainly know what the earth consumes of them [after their death], and with Us is a Preserved Record.
textTranslit: Qad 'alimnaa maa tanqu-sul-ardu minhum wa 'indanaa Kitaabun Hafeez

textAr: بَلْ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمْ فَهُمْ فِىٓ أَمْرٍ مَّرِيجٍ
textEn: Rather they rejected the truth when it came to them, so they are in a state of confusion.
textTranslit: Bal kazzaboo bilhaqqi lammaa jaaa'ahum fahum feee amrim mareej

textAr: أَفَلَمْ يَنظُرُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَوْقَهُمْ كَيْفَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا وَزَيَّنَّـٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجٍ
textEn: Have they not then looked at the sky above them – how We built it and adorned it [with stars], and it has no rifts?
textTranslit: Afalam yanzurooo ilas samaaa'i fawqahum kaifa banainaahaa wa zaiyannaahaa wa maa lahaa min furooj

textAr: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَـٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍۭ بَهِيجٍ
textEn: And We have spread out the earth and set therein firm mountains, and caused to grow therein plants of every pleasant kind,
textTranslit: Wal arda madadnaahaa wa alqainaa feehaa rawaasiya wa ambatnaa feehaa min kulli zawjim baheej

textAr: تَبْصِرَةً وَذِكْرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبْدٍ مُّنِيبٍ
textEn: as a source of insight and a reminder to every slave who turns [to Allah].
textTranslit: Tabsiratanw wa zikraa likulli 'abdim muneeb

textAr: وَنَزَّلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً مُّبَـٰرَكًا فَأَنۢبَتْنَا بِهِۦ جَنَّـٰتٍ وَحَبَّ ٱلْحَصِيدِ
textEn: And We send down from the sky blessed rain, with which We cause to grow gardens and grain for harvest,
textTranslit: Wa nazzalnaa minas samaaa'i maaa'am mubaarakan fa ambatnaa bihee jannaatinw wa habbal haseed

textAr: وَٱلنَّخْلَ بَاسِقَـٰتٍ لَّهَا طَلْعٌ نَّضِيدٌ
textEn: and towering palm trees having clustered fruit,
textTranslit: Wannakhla baasiqaatil laha tal'un nadeed

textAr: رِّزْقًا لِّلْعِبَادِ ۖ وَأَحْيَيْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْخُرُوجُ
textEn: as a provision for people, and We revive thereby a dead land; likewise will be the resurrection.
textTranslit: Rizqal lil'ibaad, wa ahyainaa bihee baldatam maitaa; kazaalikal khurooj

textAr: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلرَّسِّ وَثَمُودُ
textEn: The people of Noah rejected [the truth] before them, as well as the companions of the Well and Thamūd,
textTranslit: Kazzabat qablahum qawmu Noohinw wa Ashaabur Rassi wa Samood

textAr: وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ وَإِخْوَٰنُ لُوطٍ
textEn: and so did ‘Ād, Pharaoh, the people of Lot,
textTranslit: Wa 'Aadunw wa Fir'awnu wikhwaanu loot

textAr: وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْأَيْكَةِ وَقَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ ۚ كُلٌّ كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيدِ
textEn: and the dwellers of the Forest, and the people of Tubba‘. All of them rejected the messengers, so My warning was fulfilled.
textTranslit: Wa Ashaabul Aykati wa qawmu Tubba'; kullun kazzabar Rusula fahaqqa wa'eed

textAr: أَفَعَيِينَا بِٱلْخَلْقِ ٱلْأَوَّلِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى لَبْسٍ مِّنْ خَلْقٍ جَدِيدٍ
textEn: Were We wearied by their first creation? No indeed, yet they are in confusion concerning the second creation.
textTranslit: Afa'a yeenaa bilkhalqil awwal; bal hum fee labsim min khalqin jadeed

textAr: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفْسُهُۥ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
textEn: We have created man and know what his soul whispers within him, for We are closer to him than his jugular vein.
textTranslit: Wa laqad khalaqnal insaana wa na'lamu maa tuwaswisu bihee nafsuhoo wa Nahnu aqrabu ilaihi min hablil wareed

textAr: إِذْ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلْمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٌ
textEn: When the two angel scribes, constantly accompanying him, one on the right, and the other on the left.
textTranslit: 'Iz yatalaqqal mutalaqqi yaani 'anil yameeni wa 'anish shimaali qa'eed

textAr: مَّا يَلْفِظُ مِن قَوْلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيْهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٌ
textEn: Not a single word he utters but there is with him a vigilant watcher, ready [to record it].
textTranslit: Maa yalfizu min qawlin illaa ladaihi raqeebun 'ateed

textAr: وَجَآءَتْ سَكْرَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنْهُ تَحِيدُ
textEn: The throes of death will come with the truth. This is what you were trying to avoid.
textTranslit: Wa jaaa'at kullu nafsim ma'ahaa saaa'iqunw wa shaheed

textAr: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْوَعِيدِ
textEn: And the Trumpet will be blown; that is the Day of [the given] warning.
textTranslit: Wa nufikha fis Soor; zaalika yawmul wa'eed

textAr: وَجَآءَتْ كُلُّ نَفْسٍ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقٌ وَشَهِيدٌ
textEn: Everyone will come, accompanied by an angel to drive him and another to testify.
textTranslit: Wa jaaa'at kullu nafsim ma'ahaa saaa'iqunw wa shaheed

textAr: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِى غَفْلَةٍ مِّنْ هَـٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌ
textEn: “You were heedless of this; now We have removed your veil, so your vision is sharp Today.”
textTranslit: Laqad kunta fee ghaf latim min haazaa fakashafnaa 'anka ghitaaa'aka fabasarukal yawma hadeed

textAr: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَـٰذَا مَا لَدَىَّ عَتِيدٌ
textEn: His angel-companion will say, “Here is the record ready with me.”
textTranslit: Wa qaala qareenuhoo haazaa maa ladaiya 'ateed

textAr: أَلْقِيَا فِى جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ
textEn: [It will be said to the two angels], “Throw into Hell every obstinate disbeliever,
textTranslit: Alqiyaa fee Jahannama kulla kaffaarin 'aneed

textAr: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ مُّرِيبٍ
textEn: every withholder of good, transgressor, and doubter,
textTranslit: Mannaa'il lilkhayri mu'tadim mureeb

textAr: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَأَلْقِيَاهُ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلشَّدِيدِ
textEn: who set up with Allah another god. Throw him into the severe punishment.”
textTranslit: Allazee ja'ala ma'al laahi ilaahan aakhara fa alqiyaahu fil'azaabish shadeed

textAr: ۞ قَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ رَبَّنَا مَآ أَطْغَيْتُهُۥ وَلَـٰكِن كَانَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍۭ بَعِيدٍ
textEn: His [devil] companion will say, “Our Lord, I did not mislead him, but he himself was far astray.”
textTranslit: Qaala qareenuhoo Rabbanaa maaa atghaituhoo wa laakin kaana fee dalaahim ba'eed

textAr: قَالَ لَا تَخْتَصِمُوا۟ لَدَىَّ وَقَدْ قَدَّمْتُ إِلَيْكُم بِٱلْوَعِيدِ
textEn: Allah will say, “Do not argue in My presence, for I had already given you the warning.
textTranslit: Qaala laa takhtasimoo ladaayya wa qad qaddamtu ilaikum bilwa'eed

textAr: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلْقَوْلُ لَدَىَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِظَلَّـٰمٍ لِّلْعَبِيدِ
textEn: My Word cannot be changed, nor am I unjust to My slaves.”
textTranslit: Maa yubaddalul qawlu ladaiya wa maaa ana bizal laamil lil'abeed

textAr: يَوْمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٍ
textEn: [Beware of] the Day when We will say to Hell, “Have you reached your fill?” It will say, “Are there any more?”
textTranslit: Yawma naqoolu li'jahannama halim talaati wa taqoolu hal mim mazeed

textAr: وَأُزْلِفَتِ ٱلْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ
textEn: Paradise will be brought near to the righteous, not far off.
textTranslit: Wa uzlifatil jannatu lil muttaqeena ghaira ba'eed

textAr: هَـٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٍ
textEn: [It will be said], “This is what you were promised; this is for everyone who constantly turned [to Allah] and was dutiful,
textTranslit: Haaza maa too'adoona likulli awwaabin hafeez

textAr: مَّنْ خَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلْبٍ مُّنِيبٍ
textEn: who feared the Most Compassionate unseen, and came with a devoted heart.
textTranslit: Man khashiyar Rahmaana bilghaibi wa jaaa'a biqalbim muneeb

textAr: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَـٰمٍ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُلُودِ
textEn: Enter it in peace. This is the Day of eternity.”
textTranslit: Udkhuloohaa bisalaamin zaalika yawmul khulood

textAr: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيْنَا مَزِيدٌ
textEn: They will have therein all what they wish for, and We have yet more.
textTranslit: Lahum maa yashaaa'oona feehaa wa ladainaa mazeed

textAr: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًا فَنَقَّبُوا۟ فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ هَلْ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
textEn: How many nations We destroyed before these [Makkans] who were stronger than them in might! They sought refuge in the land. Did they find any escape?
textTranslit: Wa kam ahlaknaa qablahum min qarnin hum ashaddu minhum batshan fanaqqaboo fil bilaad, hal mim mahees

textAr: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ
textEn: Indeed, in that is a reminder for anyone who has a [mindful] heart or lends an attentive ear.
textTranslit: Inna fee zaalika lazikraa liman kaana lahoo qalbun aw alqas sam'a wa huwa shaheed

textAr: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٍ
textEn: Indeed, We created the heavens and earth and all that is between them in six days, and no weariness touched Us.
textTranslit: Wa laqad khalaqnas samaawaati wal arda wa maa bainahumaa fee sittati ayyaamin wa maa massanaa mil lughoob

textAr: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ ٱلْغُرُوبِ
textEn: So bear patiently [O Prophet] what they say, and glorify the praise of your Lord before sunrise and before sunset.
textTranslit: Fasbir 'alaa maa yaqooloona wa sabbih bihamdi Rabbika qabla tuloo'ish shamsi wa qablal ghuroob

textAr: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَأَدْبَـٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ
textEn: And glorify Him in the night and after the prayers.
textTranslit: Wa minal laili fasabbih hu wa adbaaras sujood

textAr: وَٱسْتَمِعْ يَوْمَ يُنَادِ ٱلْمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانٍ قَرِيبٍ
textEn: And listen! On the Day when the Caller will call out from a nearby place,
textTranslit: Wastami' yawma yunaa dil munaadi mim makaanin qareeb

textAr: يَوْمَ يَسْمَعُونَ ٱلصَّيْحَةَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُرُوجِ
textEn: the Day when they will hear the Blast [of the second Trumpet] in truth. That is the Day of Resurrection.
textTranslit: Yawma yasmaoonas sai hata bilhaqq zaalika yawmul khurooj

textAr: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيْنَا ٱلْمَصِيرُ
textEn: Indeed, it is We Who give life and cause death, and to Us is the final return.
textTranslit: Innaa Nahnu nuhyee wa numeetu wa ilainal maseer

textAr: يَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلْأَرْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعًا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٌ
textEn: On the Day when the earth will be rent asunder for them as they hasten forth [from their graves]; that is an easy gathering for Us.
textTranslit: Yawma tashaqqaqul ardu 'anhum siraa'aa; zaalika hashrun 'alainaa yaseer

textAr: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍ ۖ فَذَكِّرْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
textEn: We know best what they say, and you are not there to compel them to believe. But remind with the Qur’an those who fear My warning.
textTranslit: Nahnu a'lamu bimaa yaqooloona wa maaa anta 'alihim bijabbaarin fazakkir bil quraani many yakhaafu wa'eed
